name: Cream of Almond Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté the celery and garlic in butter until softened.
2. Add chicken stock, ground almonds, and mace. Cover and simmer 30-to-40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and let stand at room temperature for one hour.
4. Puree in a blender or food processor. Return to the pot.
5. Stir in cream and heat 2-to-3 minutes. Do not let the soup come to boil.
6. Taste and add salt and pepper as needed.
7. Serve sprinkled with toasted almonds.
